ideation: This sequence simulates the feeling of awe and wonder when looking at a comet streaking across the sky.  The arms will move in a sweeping motion, tracing the imagined path of the comet. The movement will start with arms outstretched to the sides, then arc upward and inward, mimicking the comet's trajectory.  The final frame will show the arms returning to a relaxed position, as if the viewer has finished marveling at the sight. The left arm will mirror the right to emphasize the sweeping, upward motion.

frames.beat: arms shoot out wide, ready to catch the sky
both arms sweep up and inward, tracing a comet's fiery path
arms return to rest, the wonder lingers
